venues.name: Albert Park
venues.surface: Concrete/asphalt tennis court with pickleball lines overlaid
venues.netType: Shared tennis net (taller than a standard pickleball net) — lines overlaid on a tennis court
venues.hours: Drop-in play Thursdays 6:30–8:30pm; weekend play also reported
venues.notes: Existing courts-data.json already carries a confirmed googleMapsUrl (cid=11157108382859201685) for this venue; left null here since this session did not independently reconfirm a cid. Street name is 'Andersen Dr' (not 'Anderson') per multiple sources including a City of San Rafael typo callout; house number varies 151 vs 155 across sources (155 Andersen Dr is actually the adjacent 'Lofts at Albert Park' apartment complex, not the park itself).

venues.name: Flyte Racquet Club
venues.address: 440 Smith Ranch Rd, San Rafael, CA 94903
venues.surface: Dedicated hard/acrylic courts, permanent lines and nets (7 indoor, 16 outdoor)
venues.price: $25 drop-in fee; monthly memberships from $199/individual (per Pickleheads-linked sources)
venues.weather: Mild, marine-influenced — less fog than the coast

conflicts.existing: $2,500 individual / $3,500 family initiation; monthly passes also available

venues.notes: Fee conflict may not be a true contradiction — the existing record's initiation fees and the newly-found drop-in/monthly rates could describe different membership tiers of the same club rather than contradictory facts. Flagging as a conflict per instructions rather than resolving it. Booking platform appears to have moved from flyte-marin.com to PlayByPoint (app.playbypoint.com/f/flyte); the existing bookingUrl may be stale.

venues.name: McInnis Park Pickleball/Tennis Courts
venues.address: 310 Smith Ranch Road, San Rafael, CA 94903
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court, permanent pickleball lines (courts 1A/1B/2A/2B; courts 3/4 remain tennis-only)
venues.netType: Portable nets on shared tennis courts
venues.price: $13 reserves two pickleball courts (drawn over one tennis court) for one hour
venues.hours: Reservations up to 5 months in advance (courts 1B, 2A, 2B); court 1A is first-come-first-served walk-on only, 1-hour limit if others are waiting
amenities: Adjacent to skatepark, 9-hole golf/mini-golf, batting cages, restaurant
venues.notes: Pickleheads lists this venue as 'McInnis Park Pickleball/Tennis Courts'; existing record uses the shorter 'McInnis Park' — matched by address/identity, not renamed here. Effective Jan 1, 2025, courts 1 and 2 were reconfigured to create four pickleball courts (doubling prior capacity). Reservable set to 'Mixed' (not a straight 'Reservable') because court 1A is walk-on only while 1B/2A/2B take reservations — treated as a refinement of the existing 'Reservable' value, not a conflict.

venues.name: McNears Beach Park
venues.price: Free (park entry became free as of July 1, 2024; no separate court fee found)
venues.hours: Seasonal park hours: Spring (Mar 8–May 22) 7am–7pm; Summer (May 23–Sep 7) 7am–8pm; Fall (Sep 8–Nov 1) 7am–7pm; Winter (Nov 2–Mar 7) 8am–5pm. Play limited to one hour or end of set when others are waiting.
venues.notes: Existing record's address was city-level only ('San Rafael, CA (Marin County Parks)'); full street address now confirmed.

venues.name: Osher Marin JCC
venues.address: 200 N San Pedro Rd, San Rafael, CA 94903
venues.surface: Hard and wood courts, permanent lines, portable nets (2 outdoor, 2 indoor)
venues.price: Free for members; $15 for a non-member accompanied by a member; $30 drop-in for non-members
venues.notes: Existing price field was a hedge ('likely JCC day-use/guest fee') — new data gives exact tiered pricing and is treated as filling in the vague field, not contradicting it. Two courts reserved for members, one for public/drop-in players — reservable set to 'Mixed' as a refinement of existing 'Reservable', not a conflict. A 'Fundamentals of Pickleball' clinic runs 2:00–4:00pm ($50 members / $75 non-members); specific recurring day not confirmed.

venues.name: Pueblo Park
venues.address: Hacienda Way, Santa Venetia, San Rafael, CA 94901
venues.surface: Acrylic, lines overlaid on a tennis court
venues.netType: Shared tennis net (taller than a standard pickleball net)
venues.notes: Described as Marin's first outdoor pickleball court. Existing record's 'skill' (3.0–3.5 players), 'hours' (variable, often 8–9am), and 'waitTime' (Medium) fields were not corroborated or contradicted by this session's sources — left as-is (Not specified in this record) since Pickleheads-linked sources didn't state them.

venues.name: Albert J. Boro Community Center
venues.surface: Gymnasium floor, taped lines, portable nets
venues.notes: Not in assets/courts-data.json or assets/venues.json baseline — new venue for San Rafael. Formerly known as Pickleweed Park Community Center; sits within Pickleweed Park on Canal Street. Indoor clinics offered through a 'Pickleball Organized' program (beginner and intermediate levels). Reservations not available per sources — walk-in drop-in only. googleMapsUrl left null: only a Google place_id (not a numeric cid) was found via Waze, and per schema rules a place_id must not be used as a substitute.

notes: All 6 existing San Rafael baseline venues (Albert Park, Flyte Racquet Club, McInnis Park, McNears Beach Park, Osher Marin JCC, Pueblo Park) matched a Pickleheads listing, so notOnPickleheads is empty. Pickleheads' city-level summary states '7 locations with 38 courts' broken into '3 locations with 12 indoor' (Flyte 7 + Osher 2 + Boro 3 = 12, checks out) and '5 locations with 26 outdoor' — but summing each venue's own outdoor count (Albert 2 + Flyte 16 + McInnis 4 + Osher 2 + Pueblo 1 + McNears 2) yields 27 across 6 outdoor-having locations, one more court and one more location than Pickleheads' own stated breakdown. This looks like an internal inconsistency in Pickleheads' auto-generated summary rather than an error introduced here; recorded pickleheadsStatedTotal verbatim as stated rather than reconciling it.
